channel.title: Ardy Febriansyah
channel.description: Welcome to my blog, call me Ardy i'm a Software Engineer

item.title: Managing React State Like a Pro
item.description: With the growing community interest in Gatsby, we hope to create more resources that make it easier for anyone to grasp the power of this incredible tool.
item.dc:creator: Ardy Febriansyah
